name: PodcastOne, Inc.
business: PodcastOne, Inc. is a leading podcast platform and publisher that makes its content available to audiences via all podcasting distribution platforms. We generate revenue from the sale of audio, video and social advertising delivered through advertising impressions. We are an Ad-Supported Service that provides free content to listeners via their mobile and desktop devices.

exposures.sentence: We earn revenue through the sale of embedded host read ads, dynamic ads (host read and otherwise), segment sponsorships, and programmatic monetization channels.

tamClaims.claim: The podcast advertising marketing grew to $3.0B in 2025 and is expected to exceed $4.2B in 2026 and reach $5B by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: The podcast advertising marketing grew to $3.0B in 2025 and is expected to exceed $4.2B in 2026 and reach $5B by 2027.

tamClaims.claim: An estimated 230 million Americans have listened to a podcast at some point in their life.
tamClaims.sentence: An estimated 230 million Americans have listened to a podcast at some point in their life.

tamClaims.claim: According to eMarketer, the number of podcast listeners is anticipated to grow to 122 million in 2026 and nearly 150 million listeners are expected to make podcasts a part of their media diet by 2027.
tamClaims.sentence: According to eMarketer, the number of podcast listeners is anticipated to grow to 122 million in 2026 and nearly 150 million listeners are expected to make podcasts a part of their media diet by 2027.
